title: Comet
description: Glide on this velvety-bronze for a foil-like finish, or blend out for a subtle star-dusting of colour, as subtle blue-shimmer peeks through copper-sparkle.
ingredients: Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)

images.alt: Comet Glitter Crumble. A neatly smudged swatch of crumbly, shimmering, earthy-bronze, metallic eyeshadow.

The image shows a close-up of the model's face on a pale blue-to-green gradient background. The model's make-up is done with the focal point being a shimmering, metallic-bronze eyeshadow made by the Comet Glitter Crumble.

The image shows a close-up of the model's face on a pale blue-to-green gradient background. The model's make-up is done with the focal point being a shimmering, metallic-bronze eyeshadow made by the Comet Glitter Crumble.
The image shows a close-up of the model's face on a pale blue background. They are holding a make-up brush to their eye area as they apply the shimmering, bronze, Glitter Crumble to their eyelids.

The image shows four model's forearms laid next to each other in varying shades of skin colour. There is a line of ten Glitter Crumble swatches across all four arms to showcase how each product colour shows up on different skin tones.
